This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-2528-jw5q-ww88. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
An issue was discovered in phpseclib 1.x before 1.0.23, 2.x before 2.0.47, and 3.x before 3.0.36. An attacker can construct a malformed certificate containing an extremely large prime to cause a denial of service (CPU consumption for an isPrime primality check).
